texto: My reading of American religious history is that religion always functions best from the margins of society and not in the councils of power. Once you identify the faith with a particular candidate or party or with the quest for political influence, ultimately it is the faith that suffers. Compromise may work in politics. It's less appropriate to the realm of faith and belief.
explicacao: Citação de Randall Balmer sobre temas ligados a fe. “My reading of American religious history is that religion always functions best from the margins …” articula fe, politics, religion em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e religion.
